title: boesenbergia kingii
intro: Boesenbergia kingii, also known as the Ginger Lily or King's Creeping Ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions in Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boesenbergia kingii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Boesenbergia kingii is often prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
